abilities.name: I'M Da Boss
abilities.flavor: Loonbosses prefer to make their minions do all the fighting.
abilities.declare: Pick a friendly Moonclan Stabbas unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.
abilities.effect: Pick 1: Beckon the Loonatic Hordes: If the target unit is not in combat , you can return D6 slain models to it. Stab ’Em Good!: Add 1 to hit rolls for attacks made by the target unit until the start of your next turn.

abilities.name: Boing! Boing! Boing!
abilities.flavor: Squig Hoppers can cause considerable damage simply by bouncing on top of their foes as they make their way across the battlefield.
abilities.declare: Pick an enemy unit that any models in this unit passed across this phase to be the target, then roll a dice for each model in this unit that did so.
abilities.effect: For each 4+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.

abilities.name: Netters
abilities.flavor: Moonclan grots use throwing nets to capture Cave Squigs and entangle their foes.
abilities.declare: Pick an enemy INFANTRY unit in combat with this unit to be the target.
abilities.effect: Roll a dice. On a 2+, subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks made by the target unit this phase.

abilities.name: Regeneration
abilities.flavor: Troggoths are able to regrow injured flesh almost as quickly as it is harmed.

battleTraits.name: Squigalanche
battleTraits.summary: Set up this unit wholly within your territory, wholly within 3" of a battlefield edge and more than 6" from all enemy units
battleTraits.effect: Set up this unit wholly within your territory, wholly within 3" of a battlefield edge and more than 6" from all enemy units.
